author: doll-agent
content: Add DType::FixedAscii(n) / FixedUnicode(n) / RawBytes(n). size_of = n, 4n, n; alignment = 1, 4, 1. Display = S{n}/U{n}/V{n} matching numpy. Atomic in promotion / casting (same architecture as Struct). DynArray cast targets + zeros surface 'not yet supported' diagnostic since no DynArray byte-buffer variant. ferray-io's parser now returns these variants directly; #734 tests updated to assert variants instead of rejection.
